entry.title: 16. 3Sum Closest

LeetCode

Approach: Two Pointers, Time complexity : O(n)

entry.title: 15. 3Sum
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach: Two Pointers

entry.title: 14. Longest Common Prefix
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Horizontal scanning, Time complexity: O(S) , where S is the sum of all characters in all strings

Approach 2: Vertical scanning, Time complexity: O(S) , where S is the sum of all characters in all strings


Approach 3: Divide and conquer, Time complexity: O(S), where S is the number of all characters in the array


Approach 4: Binary search, Time complexity: O(S⋅logm)

Approach 5: Prefix trie, Time complexity : O(S)

Approach 2: Two Pointer Approach

Approach: Sort by Row, Time Complexity: O(n), where n == len(s)

entry.title: Manacher
entry.content:
Youtube Explanation

Manacher’s Algorithm Explained— Longest Palindromic Substring

Manacher.java

entry.title: 5. Longest Palindromic Substring
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Dynamic Programming, Time complexity : O(n^2) (explanation)

Approach 2: Expand Around Center, Time complexity : O(n^2)

Approach 3: Manacher’s Algorithm, Time complexity : O(n)

entry.title: 4. Median of Two Sorted Arrays
entry.content:
LeetCode

Binary Search (variation), Time complexity: O(log(min(m,n)))

entry.title: 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force, Time complexity : O(n^3)

Approach 2: Sliding Window, Time complexity : O(2n) = O(n)

Approach 3: Sliding Window Optimized, Time complexity : O(n)
